title: Search and return match data from all CSV files
evidence: DataStore.java:76-130 loads 5 CSV files; DataStoreTest.java:32 verifies 20000+ matches loaded

title: Search and return player data
evidence: DataStore.java:132-146 loads fifa_data.csv; DataStoreTest.java:32 verifies 15000+ players

title: Compare teams head-to-head
evidence: QueryService.java:59-71 headToHead() computes wins/draws for two teams

title: Handle team name variations correctly
evidence: TeamNames.java:9-27 normalize() strips state suffixes and accents; matches() uses containment checks

title: Return properly formatted responses
evidence: McpServer.java:135-157 formatMatches() and formatPlayers() format output with limits and totals

title: Match queries (by team, date, competition, season)
evidence: QueryService.java:23-55 implements matchesForTeam, matchesBetween, matchesByCompetition, matchesBySeason, matchesByDateRange

title: Team statistics and standings
evidence: QueryService.java:73-123 implements teamStats() and standings() with proper point calculation

title: Player queries (name, club, nationality, top players)
evidence: QueryService.java:125-152 implements playersByName, playersByClub, playersByNationality, topPlayers

title: Statistical analysis (avg goals, home win rate, biggest wins)
Maven build succeeds
evidence: mvn clean compile reports BUILD SUCCESS

title: All 16 tests pass
evidence: DataStoreTest has 16 tests: loadsAllSixCsvFiles, findsMatchesBetweenTwoTeams, headToHeadHasWinsAndDraws, teamStatsForSeason, handlesTeamNameWithStateSuffix, findsMatchesByCompetition, findsMatchesBySeason, standingsForBrasileirao2019, findsPlayerByName, findsBrazilianPlayers, topPlayersSortedByOverall, averageGoalsReasonable, homeWinRateBetween0And1, biggestWinsByMargin, and 2 more - 0 failures, 0 skipped

title: Comprehensive data coverage
evidence: 6 CSV files loaded: Brasileirao_Matches.csv (4180), Brazilian_Cup_Matches.csv (1337), Libertadores_Matches.csv (1255), BR-Football-Dataset.csv (10296), novo_campeonato_brasileiro.csv (6886), fifa_data.csv (18207)

title: Multi-format date parsing
evidence: DataStore.java:41-60 parseDate() handles ISO format (yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss), ISO date (yyyy-MM-dd), Brazilian format (dd/MM/yyyy)

title: UTF-8 support for Brazilian Portuguese text
evidence: CsvReader.java:17 uses StandardCharsets.UTF_8; TeamNames.java:16-17 uses NFD normalization for accents
